issue_title: fix(dev): temporarily refactor to use previous socket url handling
issue_body_preview:
This reverts commit c7c4dd100ed0488bc84f97d3610b0d30474f9e73.

### 🔗 Linked issue

resolves https://github.com/nuxt/cli/issues/956

### 📚 Description

this temporarily reverts https://github.com/nuxt/cli/pull/952 - we'll identify the issue later if this solves it, but I'm temporarily without
test_description_zh: 启动 Nuxt 开发服务器，打开浏览器访问首页，观察页面是否正常加载，修改源代码后观察热更新（HMR）是否正常工作，WebSocket 连接是否稳定建立。
expected_result_zh: 开发服务器正常启动，页面能够正常加载显示内容，WebSocket 连接成功建立，代码修改后热更新能够正常触发，页面实时反映变更，不出现连接断开或刷新失败的情况。
